name: The Clot Thickens
short_description: DON’T WASH THOSE HANDS! Be the bacteria in 200+ challenging levels. Leap from cell to cell, infecting everything in your path. Avoid darting antibodies, circling antibiotics, and other obstacles. Let nothing stop your climb to the top of the bottom of the food chain!
detailed_description:
INFECTIOUS PUZZLES. ARCADE ACTION

  • Play as the bacteria
  • Over 200 challenging levels
  • Infect over 1000 shrinking, moving, and spiked cells
  • Maneuver carefully past threats
  • Customize your appearance
  • Easy to learn, hard to master
  • Unique gravity platformer
  • Designed for hardcore puzzle solvers - Skill & brains required!

Created by award-winning console and indie game developers, The Clot Thickens hides infectiously unique and challenging platform puzzle design!
